sections.paragraph:
Original: נסרך

Transliteration: nisrôk

Phonetic: nis-roke'

BDB Definition:

Nisroch = "the great eagle"
  1. an idol of Nineveh worshipped by Sennacherib; symbolised by the eagle-headed human figure

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: 1382

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
